description.en: No limitations on image size, unlimited usage for personal and non-commercial projects.
description.zh: 无图像大小限制，个人和非商业项目无限使用。

weaknesses.en: Limited to free tier features, no premium options available.
weaknesses.zh: 仅限免费套餐功能，无高级选项。

weaknesses.en: No detailed pricing information for potential upgrades.

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses for personal and non-commercial projects.
targetAudience.zh: 个人和小型企业，用于个人和非商业项目。

positioning.en: A simple and easy-to-use online tool for image compression and optimization.
positioning.zh: 一个简单易用的在线工具，用于图像压缩和优化。
